title: Transfer Ledger Console
concept: A light technical Playground operations console where browser save, local directory save, PR previews, GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions are handled as transfer events that mutate one selected Playground object.
focus: route validation with visible preview identity mutation
browser and local save destination consequences
protected live WordPress shell beside portability controls
flows: Preview a Gutenberg PR or branch end to end with route-specific input, validation, loading, resulting preview identity, updated path, and save/export availability
Save an unsaved Playground in browser storage with file-copy progress, active row mutation, saved identity, shell title update, slug, and Save & Reload consequence
Save to a local directory with folder picker consequence, file-copy progress, local folder identity, and reconnect warning after refresh
Delete a saved Playground with confirmation, cancellation, final fallback to an Unsaved Playground, saved-row mutation, and event history
Import a ZIP with selected archive, validation, replacement confirmation, progress, resulting preview identity, and transfer result state
Use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip without hiding the live WordPress shell
Browse a representative subset of the 43 Blueprint gallery entries with captured categories, search, selected detail, Blueprint URL, copy, download, run, validation, and result events
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview route
Gutenberg PR or branch preview route
GitHub import with account connection and non-stored token caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser framing and replacement confirmation
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset label
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Friends feed reader, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory
Browser and local save progress states
Temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory differences
Saved and unsaved Playground list with open/manage, rename, delete, confirmation, and fallback state
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Active shell title, path, storage badge, reset/reload mode, saved row, preview state, and transfer history mutation
WordPress/PHP/language settings
Include older WordPress versions option
Allow network access and create multisite toggles
Destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
Site Manager tabs for Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, and Logs
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty marker, save, and result state
Blueprint editor with JSON validation, copy link, download bundle, run, and result state
SQLite-backed database path, driver, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty and warning states
Export to GitHub
Download active Playground as .zip
Database download
Blueprint bundle copy, download, and run actions
Transfer history for GitHub, ZIP, database, Blueprint, save, rename, delete, and route preview events
